questionHtml: Derive the units of intensity in terms of fundamental SI units.
markschemeHtml:
correct units for Intensity (allow W, Nms–1 OR Js–1 in numerator)

rearrangement into proper SI units = kgs–3

 

Allow ECF for MP2 if final answer is in fundamental units.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Derive the units of intensity in terms of fundamental SI units.
